channel.title: Navin Kumar — Engineering Leader
channel.description: Application Engineering Leader · Ruby on Rails · AWS · Microservices · CI/CD. 9+ years building scalable SaaS platforms.

item.title: Portfolio Updated — March 2026
item.dc:creator: Navin Kumar
item.description: Navin Kumar's portfolio has been updated with his latest experience at CloudBolt Software as Lead Software Engineer, new skill highlights, and a refreshed editorial design.
item.content:encoded:
Navin Kumar's portfolio has been updated for 2026 with:

  • Current role: Lead Software Engineer at CloudBolt Software (Jun 2022 – Present)
  • 9+ years experience architecting scalable SaaS platforms
  • Expertise in Ruby on Rails, AWS, Azure, Microservices, CI/CD, PostgreSQL, Redis, Elasticsearch
  • Available for Senior / Lead Engineering roles globally

Contact: navinkumar2508@gmail.com

item.title: Lead Software Engineer — CloudBolt Software
item.dc:creator: Navin Kumar
item.description: Leading a team of 5+ engineers on enterprise SaaS for 10K+ users. Driving microservices migration, CI/CD improvements, ~30% performance gains, and 99.9%+ uptime.
